extraction.one_line_summary: FROOME Christopher attacked 80km from finish on Colle delle Finestre, took 6+ minutes on YATES Simon to claim virtual pink jersey
tactical_patterns: FROOME attacked alone 80km out on gravel Finestre despite isolation risk, opponents paralyzed expecting him to fade
DUMOULIN gestured PINOT not to panic when FROOME attacked, revealing collaboration against Sky rather than pursuing immediately
YATES Simon cracked catastrophically on Finestre after showing mechanical issues earlier, suggesting deterioration masked as equipment problems
CARAPAZ attacked finish for 6-second bonus in white jersey battle with LOPEZ, prioritizing GC bonuses over stage result

rider_signals.FROOME Christopher: positive: sustained 80km solo attack on gravel climb shows exceptional form and willingness to take massive tactical gamble
rider_signals.YATES Simon: negative: lost nearly 6 minutes and pink jersey after earlier fake mechanical, complete collapse suggests accumulated fatigue
rider_signals.DUMOULIN Tom: positive: recovered after Finestre to finish strong, coordinated with PINOT rather than panicking at deficit
rider_signals.PINOT Thibaut: positive: responded well when DUMOULIN gestured patience, showing good form when previously thought out of contention
rider_signals.CARAPAZ Richard: positive: tactical awareness to attack for bonus seconds in white jersey competition despite being in break remnants
